response: Wheel of time turns, wheel of history spins, wheel of memory fades, yet wheel of truth remains. Wheel of inquiry seeks, wheel of justice demands, wheel of silence breaks, and wheel of knowledge reveals. Wheel of oppression shaped, wheel of resilience endured, wheel of suffering endured, and wheel of hope persisted. Wheel of records is sparse, wheel of accounts is fragmented, wheel of evidence is scarce, and wheel of truth is obscured. Wheel of enslavement defined, wheel of bondage endured, wheel of freedom longed for, and wheel of legacy remains. Wheel of medical history is absent, wheel of personal accounts is limited, wheel of official records is nonexistent, and wheel of truth is unattainable. Wheel of inquiry is futile, wheel of access is denied, wheel of justice is delayed, and wheel of memory is preserved.
